skill.name: web-artifacts-builder
skill.description: Build complex Claude HTML artifacts with React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui components.
skill.summary: Create multi-component React artifacts and bundle them into a single shareable HTML file.
skill.author: anthropics

security_audit.summary: This official Anthropic skill provides shell scripts for creating and bundling frontend artifacts. Static risk factors are expected for this use case because the scripts install packages, create project files, and run build tools. No prompt injection attempts or malicious behavior were identified.

content.value_statement: Complex artifacts need more structure than a single HTML file can provide. This skill scaffolds a modern React workspace and bundles the finished app into one shareable HTML artifact.
actual_capabilities: Scaffolds a React 18 and TypeScript project with Vite.
Configures Tailwind CSS 3.4.1 with shadcn/ui theme variables.
Installs Radix UI and shadcn/ui component dependencies.
Adds path aliases for cleaner component imports.
Bundles the completed app into a single self-contained HTML file.
Supports Node 18 by pinning a compatible Vite version.
limitations: Requires Node.js 18 or newer and access to pnpm or npm.
Installs dependencies from package registries during setup and bundling.
Targets complex React artifacts, not simple static HTML snippets.
Does not automatically verify visual quality unless separate testing is requested.

use_cases.title: Prototype an Interactive Dashboard
use_cases.description: Create a React workspace for stateful charts, controls, tables, and responsive dashboard views.

use_cases.title: Build a Component-Rich Demo
use_cases.description: Use preinstalled shadcn/ui components to assemble dialogs, menus, forms, tabs, and data displays.

use_cases.title: Package a Shareable Artifact
use_cases.description: Bundle a completed React app into one HTML file for direct use in a Claude artifact.

prompt_templates.title: Start a New Artifact
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner setup for a structured React artifact.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use web-artifacts-builder to create a React artifact project named customer-dashboard. Include Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui components.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Stateful Interface
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate request for a richer user experience.
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a multi-panel analytics artifact with filters, tabs, cards, and a responsive table. Use the generated React project structure.

prompt_templates.title: Bundle for Sharing
prompt_templates.scenario: Prepare a completed project for artifact delivery.
prompt_templates.prompt: Bundle the current React artifact into a single HTML file. Confirm the output file name and note any build issues.

prompt_templates.title: Refine and Validate
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced workflow for quality review after implementation.
prompt_templates.prompt: Review the artifact for responsive layout, component consistency, and bundle readiness. Fix issues before creating the final HTML artifact.

output_examples.input: Create a project for a workflow planner artifact.
output_examples.output: A new React and TypeScript workspace is created with Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui components, and path aliases ready for development.

output_examples.input: Bundle my completed artifact for Claude.
output_examples.output: The project is built with Parcel, assets are inlined, and a single bundle.html file is produced for sharing.

output_examples.input: Make a complex settings console with dialogs and tabs.
output_examples.output: The artifact uses preinstalled UI components for tabs, forms, dialogs, tooltips, and responsive layout sections.

best_practices: Use this skill when the artifact needs state, routing, or several reusable components.
Keep visual testing separate unless the artifact is high risk or the user requests review.
Bundle only after the app builds successfully in the generated project.
anti_patterns: Do not use this skill for a small static HTML fragment.
Do not run setup in a directory where generated files could overwrite important work.
Do not assume package installation will work without network access.

faq.question: What does this skill create?
faq.answer: It creates a React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui project for complex web artifacts.

faq.question: Can it produce a single HTML file?
faq.answer: Yes. The bundling script builds the app and writes a self-contained bundle.html file.

faq.question: Does it require internet access?
faq.answer: Yes. The setup and bundling scripts install packages from npm-compatible registries.

faq.question: Is it useful for simple pages?
faq.answer: Usually no. A simple single-file artifact is faster when React tooling is not needed.

faq.question: Which component system is included?
faq.answer: The generated project includes shadcn/ui components and related Radix UI dependencies.

faq.question: Which AI tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
